view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for linking to calendar invites and emails is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence from the linked use case explicitly states that a unique Zoom meeting link is generated and included in the confirmation email, as well as added to both the therapist's and client's Google Calendar. This directly confirms that the requirement of having a link added to calendar invites and emails is met. The detailed scenario provided in the use case supports this conclusion, demonstrating the system's capability to fulfill the requirement.
